(module fizzbuzz
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set n int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (for i 1 (add n 1)
      (cond
        ((eq (mod i 15) 0) (println "FizzBuzz"))
        ((eq (mod i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
        ((eq (mod i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
        (true (println i))))
    (ret 0)))

(module reverse_words
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set sentence string (array_get args 0))
    (set words array (string_split sentence " "))
    (set reversed array (array_reverse words))
    (set result string (string_join reversed " "))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

import sys

words = sys.argv[1].split()
print(' '.join(reversed(words)))

(module twosum
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set target int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (set parts array (string_split (array_get args 1) " "))
    (set n int (array_length parts))
    (set nums array (array_new))
    (for i 0 n
      (set nums (array_push nums (string_to_int (array_get parts i)))))
    (set found bool false)
    (set fi int 0)
    (set fj int 0)
    (for i 0 n
      (if (not found)
        (set j int (add i 1))
        (while (and (lt j n) (not found))
          (if (eq (add (array_get nums i) (array_get nums j)) target)
            (set found bool true)
            (set fi int i)
            (set fj int j))
          (set j (add j 1)))))
    (if found
      (println (string_format "{} {}" fi fj))
      (else (println "-1")))
    (ret 0)))

(module word_count
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set text string (array_get args 0))
    (set lower string (string_to_lower text))
    (set words array (string_split lower " "))
    (set counts map (map_new))
    (for-each word string words
      (if (gt (string_length word) 0)
        (if (map_has counts word)
          (set counts (map_set counts word (add (map_get counts word) 1)))
          (else (set counts (map_set counts word 1))))))
    (set keys array (map_keys counts))
    (set sorted array (array_sort keys))
    (for-each k string sorted
      (println (string_format "{} {}" k (map_get counts k))))
    (ret 0)))

import sys
from collections import Counter

text = sys.argv[1]
words = text.lower().split()
counts = Counter(words)
for word in sorted(counts):
    print(f"{word} {counts[word]}")

(module balanced
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set s string (array_get args 0))
    (set len int (string_length s))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set balanced bool true)
    (set i int 0)
    (set top int 0)
    (while (and balanced (lt i len))
      (set c int (string_get s i))
      (cond
        ((or (or (eq c 40) (eq c 91)) (eq c 123))
          (array_push stack c))
        ((eq c 41)
          (cond
            ((eq (array_length stack) 0) (set balanced false))
            (true
              (set top (array_pop stack))
              (if (ne top 40) (set balanced false)))))
        ((eq c 93)
          (cond
            ((eq (array_length stack) 0) (set balanced false))
            (true
              (set top (array_pop stack))
              (if (ne top 91) (set balanced false)))))
        ((eq c 125)
          (cond
            ((eq (array_length stack) 0) (set balanced false))
            (true
              (set top (array_pop stack))
              (if (ne top 123) (set balanced false))))))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (cond
      ((and balanced (eq (array_length stack) 0)) (println "true"))
      (true (println "false")))
    (ret 0)))

(module rle
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set s string (array_get args 0))
    (set len int (string_length s))
    (if (eq len 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set result string "")
    (set current int (string_get s 0))
    (set count int 1)
    (for i 1 len
      (set c int (string_get s i))
      (if (eq c current)
        (set count (add count 1))
        (else
          (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code current)))
          (set result (string_concat result (string_from_int count)))
          (set current c)
          (set count 1))))
    (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code current)))
    (set result (string_concat result (string_from_int count)))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

import sys

s = sys.argv[1]
result = []
i = 0
while i < len(s):
    c = s[i]
    count = 1
    while i + count < len(s) and s[i + count] == c:
        count += 1
    result.append(c + str(count))
    i += count
print(''.join(result))

(module qs
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (if (eq (string_length input) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set parts array (string_split input "&"))
    (array_sort parts)
    (for-each pair string parts
      (println pair))
    (ret 0)))

import sys
from urllib.parse import parse_qsl

query = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
if query:
    pairs = parse_qsl(query, keep_blank_values=True)
    for key, value in sorted(pairs, key=lambda x: x[0]):
        print(f"{key}={value}")

(module rpn
  (fn is_operator tok string -> bool
    (or (string_equals tok "+")
      (or (string_equals tok "-")
        (or (string_equals tok "*")
          (string_equals tok "/")))))

  (fn apply_op op string a int b int -> int
    (cond
      ((string_equals op "+") (ret (add a b)))
      ((string_equals op "-") (ret (sub a b)))
      ((string_equals op "*") (ret (mul a b)))
      (true (ret (div a b)))))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set expr string (array_get args 0))
    (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set n int (array_length tokens))
    (set tok string "")
    (set a int 0)
    (set b int 0)
    (set result int 0)
    (set num int 0)
    (for i 0 n
      (set tok (array_get tokens i))
      (if (is_operator tok)
        (set b (array_pop stack))
        (set a (array_pop stack))
        (set result (apply_op tok a b))
        (array_push stack result)
        (else
          (set num (string_to_int tok))
          (array_push stack num))))
    (set final int (array_pop stack))
    (println final)
    (ret 0)))

(module rpn
  (fn is_operator tok string -> bool
    (cond
      ((string_equals tok "+") (ret true))
      ((string_equals tok "-") (ret true))
      ((string_equals tok "*") (ret true))
      ((string_equals tok "/") (ret true))
      (true (ret false))))

  (fn apply_op op string a int b int -> int
    (cond
      ((string_equals op "+") (ret (add a b)))
      ((string_equals op "-") (ret (sub a b)))
      ((string_equals op "*") (ret (mul a b)))
      (true (ret (div a b)))))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set expr string (array_get args 0))
    (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set n int (array_length tokens))
    (set tok string "")
    (set a int 0)
    (set b int 0)
    (set result int 0)
    (set num int 0)
    (set is_op bool false)
    (for i 0 n
      (set tok (array_get tokens i))
      (set is_op (is_operator tok))
      (cond
        (is_op
          (set b (array_pop stack))
          (set a (array_pop stack))
          (set result (apply_op tok a b))
          (array_push stack result))
        (true
          (set num (string_to_int tok))
          (array_push stack num))))
    (set final int (array_pop stack))
    (println final)
    (ret 0)))

(module transpose
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (set rows array (string_split input ";"))
    (set num_rows int (array_length rows))

    (set matrix array (array_new))
    (set row_str string "")
    (set cols array (array_new))
    (for i 0 num_rows
      (set row_str (array_get rows i))
      (set cols (string_split row_str ","))
      (array_push matrix cols))

    (set first_row array (array_get matrix 0))
    (set num_cols int (array_length first_row))

    (set out_row array (array_new))
    (set row array (array_new))
    (set val string "")
    (for j 0 num_cols
      (set out_row (array_new))
      (for i 0 num_rows
        (set row (array_get matrix i))
        (set val (array_get row j))
        (array_push out_row val))
      (println (string_join out_row ",")))

    (ret 0)))

import sys

matrix = [row.split(',') for row in sys.argv[1].split(';')]
transposed = list(zip(*matrix))
for row in transposed:
    print(','.join(row))

(module caesar
  (fn shift_char c int s int -> int
    (if (and (ge c 65) (le c 90))
      (ret (add (mod (add (sub c 65) s) 26) 65)))
    (if (and (ge c 97) (le c 122))
      (ret (add (mod (add (sub c 97) s) 26) 97)))
    (ret c))

  (fn caesar msg string s int -> string
    (set result string "")
    (set len int (string_length msg))
    (for i 0 len
      (set c int (string_get msg i))
      (set shifted int (shift_char c s))
      (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code shifted))))
    (ret result))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set mode string (array_get args 0))
    (set shift_str string (array_get args 1))
    (set msg string (array_get args 2))
    (set shift int (string_to_int shift_str))
    (set normalized int (mod (add (mod shift 26) 26) 26))
    (if (string_equals mode "decode")
      (set normalized (mod (sub 26 normalized) 26)))
    (println (caesar msg normalized))
    (ret 0)))
